title: lotodes fruticans
intro: Lotodes fruticans, also known as Water Plantain or Brooklime, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Haloragaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, it has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lotodes fruticans include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, and its leaves can also be used as a cooking green in salads and soups.
